retrieved_result: Physician / Doctor, Cardiologist  Salary Physician / Doctor, Cardiologist Salary (Canada)The average pay for a Physician / Doctor, Cardiologist is C$149,019 per year. Most people move on to other jobs if they have more than 20 years' experience in this career. Experience strongly influences income for this job. C$73K C$98K C$190K C$290K C$
